name: Salicylic Powder Exfoliator
benefit: Experience the skin smoothing & brightening effect of the NEW Salicylic Powder Exfoliator. This tri-active powder formulation contains salicylic acid and fruit enzymes to effectively remove keratinised skin cells and boost skin clarity. The addition of extra fine rice powder gently polishes the surface of the skin for a refined skin texture while niacinamide (Vitamin B3) boosts skin health and brightness. VitaDerm’s Salicylic Powder Exfoliator is an advanced tri-active formulation containing Salicylic Acid, Fruit Enzymes and Niacinamide. WHAT ARE THE ACTIVE INGREDIENTS? Salicylic acid is an oil-soluble hydroxy acid that effectively exfoliates the surface of the skin as well as inside the pores to reduce the buildup of congestion, target breakouts and refine the appearance of pores. In addition, it evens out skin tone and helps fade dark spots for brighter-looking skin. Papain extract is a natural fruit-derived enzyme that helps to remove dry, keratinised skin cells, leaving the skin looking and feeling smoother and healthier. Exfoliation also helps to refine skin texture and promote cell renewal. Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) works with the natural substances in the skin to regulate sebum production and improve barrier function. It visibly minimises pore size, fights premature skin ageing, hydrates the skin and improves skin brightness. Ultra-fine rice powder has been included in the formula for its mechanical exfoliating properties. This antioxidant-rich powder gently polishes the surface of the skin for a smooth and radiant appearance. The anti-inflammatory properties of rice powder target premature skin ageing and boost overall skin health. Visible Results Improved skin texture: By exfoliating and removing the outer layer of dead skin, the skin looks smoother and fine lines are less pronounced. Brighter, more even skin tone: Regular exfoliation helps stimulate cell renewal which promotes healthy-looking skin and reduces the prevalence of hyperpigmented skin cells. Clearer skin: Salicylic acid works deeply by exfoliating inside the pores, thereby reducing the build-up of congestion that leads to breakout. The addition of niacinamide soothes the skin and regulates sebum production. HOW DOES SALICYLIC POWDER EXFOLIATOR WORK? The combination of both chemical and mechanical exfoliating ingredients in this powder exfoliator helps with removing dead skin cells as well as improves the speed of cell turnover which leaves the skin brighter, smoother and more radiant.

It visibly minimises pore size, fights premature skin ageing, hydrates the skin and improves skin brightness. Ultra-fine rice powder has been included in the formula for its mechanical exfoliating properties. This antioxidant-rich powder gently polishes the surface of the skin for a smooth and radiant appearance. The anti-inflammatory properties of rice powder target premature skin ageing and boost overall skin health. Visible Results Improved skin texture: By exfoliating and removing the outer layer of dead skin, the skin looks smoother and fine lines are less pronounced. Brighter, more even skin tone: Regular exfoliation helps stimulate cell renewal which promotes healthy-looking skin and reduces the prevalence of hyperpigmented skin cells. Clearer skin: Salicylic acid works deeply by exfoliating inside the pores, thereby reducing the build-up of congestion that leads to breakout. The addition of niacinamide soothes the skin and regulates sebum production. HOW DOES SALICYLIC POWDER EXFOLIATOR WORK? The combination of both chemical and mechanical exfoliating ingredients in this powder exfoliator helps with removing dead skin cells as well as improves the speed of cell turnover which leaves the skin brighter, smoother and more radiant.
directions: Decant a small amount of Salicylic Powder Exfoliator into the palm of the hand and create a creamy paste by adding a few drops of water. Retinyl palmitate is a milder derivative of Vitamin A, which increases the activity of the serum without the associated irritation that is often experienced with retinol products. The addition of betacarotene, a precursor of Vitamin A, provides a wonderful conditioning effect, ensuring a radiant complexion. Visible Results With regular use of VitaDerm’s Retinol Serum, the dermal- and epidermal layers of the skin appear plumper and wrinkles appear to be reduced in number, length and width. The complexion appears fresher and adequately supplied with moisture. This serum is suitable for normal, dry and very dry skin. Innovative Packaging The Retinol Serum is presented in an airless pump dispenser bottle, which protects the contents from exposure to oxygen, thereby retaining the effectiveness of the active ingredients.

name: Hydroxy Acid Serum
benefit: This Hydroxy Acid Serum incorporates the powerful exfoliating effect of both alpha- and beta hydroxy acids, including mandelic-, salicylic-, glycolic-, pyruvic- and lactic acid to visibly improve skin clarity. These powerful ingredients work together to restore radiance to all skin types and assist in reducing fine lines and wrinkles by promoting the desquamation of keratinised skin cells and stimulating cellular regeneration. Specifically salicylic acid, an oil-soluble beta hydroxy acid, has the proven ability to exfoliate inside the pilosebaceous unit, thereby decongesting the pores for an overall clearer, healthier complexion. In the case of oily/acne-prone skin types, this serum encourages fewer breakouts by replenishing the acid mantle of the epidermis. By restoring this natural acidity, the skin is able to protect itself more effectively against microbes. This product also assists the skin in healing more rapidly. Ideal for those concerned with uneven pigmentation, congestion and fine lines and wrinkles.

name: Rejuvenate & Restore Skin Capsules
benefit: VitaDerm’s Rejuvenate and Restore capsules are formulated with 10% Argireline peptide solution What is Argireline ? Argireline is a hexapeptide composed of short chains of amino acids. It functions similarly to botulinum toxin, achieving its paralytic effect through rapid blockage of neuromuscular transmission thereby offering visible line-smoothing benefits with regular use. How does Argireline work? Argireline works by inhibiting muscle contractions, similar to Botox. After topical application, Argireline binds to cellular receptors where it acts on the message pathways to muscles, resulting in a temporary relaxation. By reducing facial muscle activity, it minimises the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, particularly those caused by repetitive facial expressions. Visible results Reduces wrinkles Argireline acts on the message pathways to muscles, thereby offering a muscle-relaxing effect that reduces the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines caused by facial expressions. Regular use will help prevent new expression lines from forming. Non-invasive alternative to Botox This topical alternative to Botox (botulinum toxin injections) offers a non-invasive option for those avoiding injections. Supports collagen production Argireline incorporates amino acids that are essential for the production of collagen and elastin, contributing to skin elasticity and firmness. Safe and well-tolerated Argireline is a safe, non-invasive and topical solution for targeting expression lines. Hydration and moisture retention The synergistic effect of the ingredients contained in these capsules offers outstanding skin conditioning benefits, thereby improving moisture retention.

name: Retin-Glow Skin Capsules
benefit: VitaDerm’s Retin-Glow Skin Capsules are formulated with 2.2% Retinol, 2% Vitamin C and 0.05% Lipochroman molecule. What are the active ingredients? Retinol accelerates cell renewal and enhances skin regeneration resulting in the reduction of fine lines and wrinkles, giving the skin a youthful and plumper appearance. Vitamin C is a protective anti-oxidant that boosts collagen production and brightens the skin’s complexion resulting in an even and radiant skin tone. Lipochroman molecule promotes skin detoxification by capturing and eliminating free radicals in the skin, thereby offering superior antioxidant properties and protecting the skin against future free-radical damage. How does Retin-Glow Skin Capsules work? Retinol stimulates fibroblasts to produce collagen fibres and increases cell renewal, thereby improving elasticity, reducing inflammation and improving the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. The powerful anti-oxidant properties from the Lipochroman molecule and Vitamin C help fight free radicals that cause premature skin ageing and brighten skin. Visible results Minimises wrinkles and fine lines Improves firmness and elasticity of the skin through cell renewal & regeneration. Brightens the skin Vitamin C is a powerful anti-oxidant that helps neutralise free radicals and targets dark spots, leaving skin with a bright and even radiance. Supports collagen synthesis Retinol increases cell proliferation and stimulates fibroblasts to produce collagen fibres. Protects the skin Guards against damage from UV exposure and offers anti-inflammatory effects due to anti-oxidants present.
